meaning: adj.[鐗鍒嗗厜闀滅殑,鍊熷姪鍒嗗厜闀滅殑
examples: A kind of spectroscopic library of elements was compiled using flame tests.

Principles and applications of modern near infrared spectroscopic techniques.
Indeed, from a purely spectroscopic point of view, there is, in effect, now a continuum.
Spectroscopic analysis of the atmospheres of gaseous planets such as Jupiter suggested the ingredients used were abundant.
